_note: REAL crawled price reference (NOT the latency leaderboard). USD per 1M tokens, input/output. This is a dated price snapshot for context; the latency/availability leaderboard (data/pricing.json + data/summary.json) is separate and stays null until a real keyed run. DaoXE 'default' group = official USD parity; sticker savings come from choosing a low-price group (~30–80% off for GPT/Claude/Gemini/Grok). REAL COST — apply the 1:1 top-up: every payment method (Alipay/WeChat/USDT) tops up 1 RMB = $1 of credit while models bill at USD official rates, so real money paid ≈ USD sticker ÷ ~7.2 (≈1/7, ~85% off) for Western flagships. Domestic models (DeepSeek/Qwen/GLM) carry a higher USD sticker than going direct, but after the 1:1 top-up their real cost still lands BELOW direct — just a smaller saving (the old 'domestic models cost more on DaoXE' counter-example held on the USD-sticker axis only and is now retired). daoxe crawled 2026-07-19 ~20:26 UTC (/api/pricing); official pricing pages 2026-07-19. Prices drift — daoxe.com/pricing is authoritative.

_meta.daoxe_price_formula: USD/1M input = model_ratio × 2 × group_ratio; output = input × completion_ratio; default group_ratio = 1.0 (official parity).

honesty.default_group: ≈ official list price (parity), verified against 4 vendors' list prices
honesty.low_price_groups: GPT/Claude/Gemini/Grok run ~30–80% below official via relay/low-price groups; the most aggressive reverse/subsidy/'福利' channels go lower but DaoXE's own labels flag them 'quality not guaranteed / medium stability / subsidized' (a stability trade-off, marked with * below).
honesty.counter_example: Domestic models (DeepSeek/Qwen/GLM) carry a higher USD sticker on DaoXE (~2–4× vs going direct, see deepseek-v4-pro), BUT because every payment tops up 1 RMB = $1 (real cost ÷ ~7.2), their real cost still lands below going direct — a smaller saving than Western flagships, not a loss. The earlier 'domestic models cost more / go direct' framing was USD-sticker-only and is retired; see honesty.topup.
honesty.topup: All payment methods (Alipay/WeChat/USDT) top up 1 RMB = $1 of credit; models bill at USD official rates. This file lists USD STICKER prices only — divide by the real FX (~7.2 RMB/USD) to get real money paid: ≈1/7 (~85% off) for Western flagships, a smaller-but-real saving for domestic models. FX drifts; daoxe.com/pricing is authoritative (top up a small amount to verify).
honesty.grok_welfare_note: The grok-福利 group needs a paid '1.5 元 大乐购' activation before it applies.

daoxe:gemini-2.5-pro@ant-gemini.note: official Gemini relay group; ≈70% below official list

daoxe:gemini-3.5-flash@ant-gemini.note: official Gemini relay group; ≈70% below official list

daoxe:claude-opus-4-5@officialmax.note: stable full-strength group; ≈30% below official. Reverse group (claude-kiro-逆向, 0.15) is lower still but stability not guaranteed.

daoxe:claude-haiku-4-5@kiro-reverse.note: * reverse channel; ≈85% below official but stability NOT guaranteed (DaoXE's own label)

daoxe:gpt-5.5@codex-pro.note: gpt pro pool; ≈80% below official. Cheapest 超低价codex-GPT (0.05) lower still.

daoxe:grok-4.5@welfare.note: * subsidy group; ≈95% below official but requires paid '1.5 元 大乐购' activation first

daoxe:grok-4.3@welfare.note: * subsidy group; ≈95% below official but requires paid '1.5 元 大乐购' activation first

daoxe:deepseek-v4-pro.provider: DaoXE (default) — USD sticker higher; real cost lower after 1:1 top-up
daoxe:deepseek-v4-pro.note: USD sticker ~4× DeepSeek-direct, BUT with 1 RMB=$1 top-up (real ÷ ~7.2) real cost lands below going direct — a smaller saving than Western flagships. Old 'more expensive, go direct' counter-example was USD-sticker-only, now retired (see _meta.honesty.topup)

daoxe:deepseek-v4-pro@overseas-domestic.provider: DaoXE (海外国产模型, 0.50) — low-price group
daoxe:deepseek-v4-pro@overseas-domestic.note: USD sticker ~2× DeepSeek-direct, but after 1 RMB=$1 top-up (real ÷ ~7.2) real cost is well below going direct

daoxe:deepseek-v4-flash@overseas-domesti.note: low-price group ≈50% below official for this flash model
